Deja Vu wala feel 🌀

👻
It started with a Snap req
A random request. An unknown face. Then you asked for the insta ID — aur wahan se sab shuru hua.
💌
Insta pe baat — stickers churana
Late night DMs. Crying cat memes. You straight up stealing my stickers and using them against me. That was the vibe from day one 😭
🍬
jajrjsnans — the nickname era
"Ye kya hai nickname 😭🤌" — your exact reaction. I had zero explanation. Pure randomness. And you still replied 😂
🎥
First saved snap — yellow dress wali
Maine pehli baar tumhara snap save kiya. Yellow dress. Tumhe pata bhi nahi tha tab. 😌
😤
LOKANLA — life ka pehla sorry
Do you remember? The word "LOKANLA" — jiske wajah se tum pehli baar gussa hui thi mujhse. Aur maine uss din pehli baar kisi ladki ko genuinely sorry bola. Zindagi ka pehla sorry. 🙏
🎨
Drawing — aur woh curse
Maine tumhari drawing banayi thi. Tumne us curse ke baare mein bataya. Aur maine kaha — agar curse real ho gaya, toh main zindagi mein pencil nahi utaunga sketch ke liye. Dramatic? Haan. But that's how it was. 🖊️
🥤
Rio Wildberry — "deja vuuu x2 😏"
Tumne suggest kiya tha. Ab jab bhi Rio dikhta hai, ye smile aa hi jaati hai involuntarily.
🤞
TWINN era 💜
Cutie. Baddie. TWINN. We both called each other that. Whatever it was — it was real, it was ours, and it mattered.
🌧️
Aur phir... distance
Block. Silence. But memories don't uninstall. Kuch cheezein feel hone se ruk nahi jaatein.
haan haan, dono ko pata hai

Hall of Fame 😭

🎭
Sticker Spam Attack
Maine stickers banaye apne liye. Tumne unhe churaya. Aur mujhe hi chidane ke liye use kiya. Professionally. Maliciously. Lovingly 😭
😋☝🏻
Emoji Combo Queen
Har doosre text mein 😋☝🏻 — that was your signature. I could always tell it was you, even without seeing the name.
🙏😂
1000 Sorry — Har Language Mein
Sorry. Maaf karo. Désolé. Scusa. Lo siento. 미안해. माफ करना. Every language. Multiple times. You still made me grovel a little more 😭
🌑✨
Depression Era se Nikalna
Tumhe pata bhi nahi hoga kitna fark pada. You were there when I needed it most. That's not a small thing. That actually mattered.
🤞💜
TWINN — dono taraf se
It wasn't just a word. Hum dono ek doosre ko TWINN bolte the. And somehow that word meant something. Still does.

ek chhota sa game 🎮

Still mad at me? 🥺

Namu... are you still mad at me? 👀

dil se

Maaf karna Namu 💜

Hey Namu,

I'm not here to say "please come back" or to undo anything. You chose distance — I respect that.

But if anything I said or did hurt you, or pushed you away when I shouldn't have — I'm genuinely sorry. Not the 1000-language sorry this time. Just one. And I mean it.

You helped me out of my worst phase. You didn't have to, but you were there. That's something I won't forget.

Aaj bas itna kehna tha — tu yaad hai. Achhe se yaad hai. The memories don't feel sad. They feel warm.

Happy Birthday in Advance, yaar. 🎂

— Twinn 🤞💜
04 august 🎂

Happy Birthday
in Advance ✨

This year, may you get everything you deserve —
good vibes, good people, good food 🍜
and definitely one Rio Wildberry 🥤

A lot of people will wish you on August 4th.
I'm just the one who made an entire website before that. 😌

Tere bday pe alag website aayegi —
the most special one. No deja vu. Just you and your pure memories. 💜

with love, Twinn 🤞

You're special, TWINN. Always were. 💜

Tu snap pe kab block kare bol nahi skte —
isi liye advance mein abhi wish lele. 😌

* yes, that was sarcasm. the good kind. the kind only a twinn would get. 🤞
